title: The Samurai Rejoin the Plan
description: Pages 11–14 focus on the samurai rejoin the plan, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Zoro, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as kinemon reunites with Kanjuro beneath Dressrosa while the allies search for ways up the plateau and toward Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: On top of Pica's Stone Statue

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm impressed. You actually thought you'd be able to take straw hat's head?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You guys! Why the hell are you flying!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Er...uh...if you're not too busy do you still think you could sign something...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've got to get to the other side of that statue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Okay, fine...but how are you guys fly-

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Shit! I can't make a barrier that big!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: He went back inside it, eh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I think I got the hang of it now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Get this through your thick skull!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I'm the man that will one day be this world's best swordsman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You were never in my league to begin with!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I forgot to tell you something. The straw hat pirates aren't all just...

summary: The Samurai Rejoin the Plan develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Zoro, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
